events.content: FAIL #1: The deliverable file AUTO-005-deliverable.md does not exist in the work directory — no artifact was written to disk, so there is nothing to review. Additionally, the inline content contains an internal math inconsistency: the §5.1 revenue table implies ~300k interactions/customer while the stated as

Parked after 2 fails: The deploy.sh and rollback.sh scripts use a quoted heredoc ('EOF') which suppresses variable expansion, so ${IMAGE_NAME}, ${IMAGE_TAG}, and ${ENVIRONMENT} are sent as literals to the remote VM where they are undefined — docker pull/run would target an empty tag.
